overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a gothic wizarding common room (Slytherin) with high vaulted ceilings, stone architecture, and large stained glass windows. The character walks through the dimly lit space illuminated by fireplaces and moonlight, passing NPCs in robes and ornate Victorian furniture.

agents.ego_description: walking from the curved entrance corridor into the main common room, passing a stone serpent statue and notice board

entered.detail: intricately carved stone statue of a serpent in a wall niche
dark wood bulletin board with papers pinned to it
large stone fireplace with burning fire and carved mantelpiece
gothic arched windows with blue glass showing night sky
large ornate rug with green and gold patterns covering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a curved stone corridor with a serpent statue, moving forward into a vast gothic common room. The camera approaches a central fireplace with leather armchairs arranged around it, while tall stained glass windows become visible in the distance. The space is dimly lit by wall sconces and firelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room study area near windows

events.description: approaching the large windows, the blue moonlight becomes more prominent and backlights the scene

agents.ego_description: walking across the common room toward the tall stained glass windows, passing study tables and a globe stand

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at a desk near the wall, studying

entered.detail: wooden desks with chairs arranged for studying
large antique globe on a wooden stand
glass case containing a skeleton or artifact

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the common room toward the far wall dominated by three tall gothic windows. The lighting shifts to a cooler tone as the blue night sky becomes visible through the stained glass. Study furniture and a large globe stand occupy the center of the room.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the full height of the stained glass windows
turning around to head back into the main room, away from the windows

agents.ego_description: examining the stained glass windows up close, then turning to explore the room and approaching conversing students

notable_agents.action: two students in dark wizarding robes conversing near a display case

entered.detail: upholstered sofa with tufted green fabric and wooden frame
low table with items on it sitting on a white fur rug
tall dark wood clock with ornate carvings

segments.scene_description: Standing at the tall windows looking up at the gothic architecture and night sky outside, then turning back into the room. The camera passes two NPC students conversing near a display case and a green velvet sofa. The fireplace becomes visible again in the distance as the camera moves away from the windows.

events.description: moving from the window area back to the central fireplace zone, passing various seating arrangements

agents.ego_description: circling around the common room, observing the furniture, architecture, and other students from different angles

notable_agents.action: two students continuing their conversation in the middle of the room
student seated at a table near the wall

entered.detail: round wooden table with a chess board and pieces set up for play

segments.scene_description: Exploring the central seating area of the common room, circling past the fireplace and various arrangements of sofas and tables. The camera passes the conversing NPCs again and shows different angles of the gothic architecture, including stone pillars, tapestries, and the ornate fireplace from multiple perspectives.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow stone corridor into a vast, dimly lit gothic common room that transitions from warm firelight to cool moonlight. It begins by passing a serpent statue in a curved hallway before opening into the main chamber, where the camera glides toward a central fireplace surrounded by leather armchairs. As the movement continues deeper into the room, the warm glow of wall sconces gives way to cooler tones as the camera approaches three towering stained glass windows revealing a blue night sky. After pausing to look up at the gothic architecture and the stars outside, the camera turns back toward the interior, passing conversing students and a green velvet sofa before the distant fireplace comes back into view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic common room, circling the central seating area to reveal the depth of the architecture. It begins by gliding past a series of plush sofas and tables, weaving through the space as the camera orbits the warmth of a large, ornate fireplace. As the movement continues, the perspective shifts to capture the towering stone pillars and intricate tapestries that line the walls, passing by conversing NPCs in robes. The scene then expands to showcase the vaulted ceilings from multiple angles before finally settling on a sweeping view of the room's dim, atmospheric lighting.
